name: covent-pi-mom
description: Socket Mode Slack bridge for routing Covent Slack requests into Pi agents.

scripts.check: node --check index.mjs && node --check doctor.mjs && node --check lib/agent-run-card.mjs && node --check lib/agent-run-store.mjs && node --check lib/agent-runners.mjs && node --check lib/slack-canvas.mjs && node --check lib/control-plane/registry-loader.mjs && node --check lib/linear-idempotency.mjs && node --check test-agent-run-card.mjs && node --check test-control-plane-registry.mjs && node --check test-linear-idempotency.mjs && node test-agent-run-card.mjs && node test-control-plane-registry.mjs && node test-linear-idempotency.mjs
